name: tailor-resume
description: Generate job-tailored resume packages from a YAML resume source of truth.

interface.shortDescription: Generate job-tailored resume packages from a YAML resume bank.
interface.longDescription: Tailor Resume helps Codex turn a job posting and a user-provided resume YAML source of truth into a provenance-backed resume package with DOCX, PDF, ATS checks, gap notes, and a rationale report.
defaultPrompt: Tailor my resume for this job URL using my resume YAML.
